text: - 9) All work is to be plumb, level and square within the tolerances defined by the manufacture (s). Temporary bracing and / or cribbing to prevent distortion of newly installed work shall be utilized under this Subcontract Agreement until such time that the structural integrity of the Granite  Countertop  system  has  been  achieved  and  all  work  is  self-supporting  without significant deformation.  All temporary materials shall be removed, consolidated and moved forward by the subcontractor for his use in the execution of his work or removed from the project site.
